title: viola aurata
intro: Viola aurata, also known as the golden violet, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Viola aurata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Viola aurata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
